dataset: Chen et al. (2021) DFPT phonon density of states
underlying_source: Petretto et al., high-throughput DFPT phonon database (Sci. Data 5, 180065, 2018)

obtained.found_via: the Chen et al. paper's data-availability link to the authors' GitHub reproduction repo

paper.citation: Chen, Andrejevic, Smidt, Ding, Xu, Chuang, Lou, Cheng, Owens, Li. Direct Prediction of Phonon Density of States with Euclidean Neural Networks. Adv. Sci. 8, 2004214 (2021).

files.name: phdos_e3nn_len51max1000_fwin101ord3.pkl
files.role: training data: material_id[1524], cif[1524], phfre(51), phdos(1524,51), phfre_gt(4404), phdos_gt(1524,4404)

files.name: reference_model.torch
files.role: authors' trained e3nn model (sanity-check reference, not data)

files.name: mp_screening.csv (mp_data.csv)
files.role: 4347 (mp-id, formula) rows for the downstream high-Cv demo; no DoS

files.name: phdos_dataset.zip
files.role: archive the .pkl was extracted from (kept for re-extract)
